主要發現: 本週熱門研究主題: mortality (2篇), personalized (1篇), proteinuria (1篇)
高品質證據: 1 篇 RCT, 1 篇統合分析

PICO.P_族群: 患有 Kidney Neoplasms 的病人
PICO.I_介入: the AirSeal To evaluate the association of the AirSeal®

重點文章.中文摘要: 【主要結果】suggest AirSeal may serve as a workflow-enhancing adjunct in RPN while preserving equivalent ischemic outcomes.

結構化摘要.完整摘要: To evaluate the association of the AirSeal® insufflation system on ischemia time and perioperative outcomes in robotic partial nephrectomy (RPN). A retrospective comparative cohort study was conducted including 71 consecutive patients undergoing transperitoneal RPN using the da Vinci Xi platform. Cases were divided according to insufflation system: conventional pneumoperitoneum (No AirSeal, n = 41) and AirSeal® (n = 30). Baseline variables included age, sex, BMI, tumor size (CT and pathology), and RENAL score. Operative and postoperative outcomes included ischemia time, console time, docking time, total operative time, estimated blood loss (EBL), drain duration, length of stay (LOS), and conversion rate. Continuous variables were compared using Welch's t-test or Mann-Whitney U test as appropriate; categorical variables were analyzed using Fisher's exact test. Baseline tumor complexity was comparable between groups, including CT tumor size (27.84 ± 13.72 vs. 26.93 ± 14.10 mm, p = 0.787)

重點文章.標題: Streamlining Alzheimer's disease diagnosis: real-world validation of two-cut-off diagnostic models based on plasma p-tau/Aβ42 ratios.

PICO.P_族群: 204 outpatients referred to the memory clinic of Policlinico "Rome Tor Vergata" who underwent standard work-up, lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid (
PICO.I_介入: sex, age (< 75, ≥ 75 years), chronic kidney disease, and cognitive impairment (MMSE ≥ 26/30, < 26/30)
PICO.O_結果: plasma biomarkers performance in detecting biologically defined AD

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究方法】We enrolled 204 outpatients referred to the memory clinic of Policlinico "Rome Tor Vergata" who underwent standard work-up, lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) biomarkers and paired blood sampling.

【主要結果】Among single analytes, plasma p-tau217 showed the highest discriminative capacity (AUC 0.883). Combined ratios improved overall performance (p-tau181/Aβ42, AUC 0.928; p-tau217/Aβ42, AUC 0.

結構化摘要.方法: We enrolled 204 outpatients referred to the memory clinic of Policlinico "Rome Tor Vergata" who underwent standard work-up, lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) biomarkers and paired blood sampling. Among plasma biomarkers, phosphorylated tau (p-tau) 181, p-tau217, and their ratios adjusted for Aβ42 were measured on the Lumipulse platform. AD pathology was defined by CSF p-tau181/Aβ42 ≥ 0.069. ROC analyses estimated AUCs, and a two-cut-off approach targeting 90% sensitivity and specific
結構化摘要.結果: Among single analytes, plasma p-tau217 showed the highest discriminative capacity (AUC 0.883). Combined ratios improved overall performance (p-tau181/Aβ42, AUC 0.928; p-tau217/Aβ42, AUC 0.894) and reduced intermediate-risk classifications to < 15%, with slightly better performance in women, patients < 75 and cognitively unimpaired. The two-cut-off model improved accuracy and rule-in ability.

重點文章.標題: Prediction of infectious complications after supine percutaneous nephrolithotomy: development and internal validation of a multivariable nomogram.

PICO.P_族群: 患有 Nephrolithotomy, Percutaneous, Kidney Calculi 的病人

重點文章.中文摘要: 【研究目的】本世代研究旨在探討ed at reducing infectious morbidity.

結構化摘要.完整摘要: To identify independent predictors of postoperative infectious complications following supine percutaneous nephrolithotomy (PCNL) and to develop and internally validate a predictive nomogram for individualized risk stratification. A prospective cohort study was performed including 906 renal units undergoing supine PCNL at a single tertiary referral center between October 2008 and December 2025. Patients were categorized into two groups according to postoperative infectious outcomes: those without infection (n = 804) and those with infection (n = 102), defined by the occurrence of postoperative fever or urosepsis. Univariate and multivariate logistic regression analyses were performed to identify independent predictors of infectious complications. Based on these predictors, a nomogram was developed, and its performance was assessed in terms of discrimination using the area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) and calibration using calibration plots. 重點文章.標題: Safety and efficacy of percutaneous nephrolithotomy in elderly patients: a systematic review and meta-analysis by the EAU-YAU urolithiasis and EAU endourology sections.

PICO.P_族群: 患有 Nephrolithotomy, Percutaneous, Kidney Calculi 的病人
PICO.C_對照: non-elderly patients were identified through comprehensive searches of PubMed/MEDLINE
PICO.O_結果: s included overall, minor, and major complications, as well as stone-free rate (SFR)

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本統合分析旨在探討The aim of this study was to evaluate differences in safety and efficacy outcomes of PCNL between elderly and non-elderly patients, with special focus on commonly applied age cut-off values.

【研究方法】A systematic review and meta-analysis were conducted in accordance with PRISMA guidelines. Comparative studies evaluating outcomes of PCNL in elderly versus non-elderly patients were identified through comprehensive searches of PubMed/MEDLINE, Embase, Web of Science, and the Cochrane Library up to F...

【主要結果】Seventeen studies encompassing 45,603 patients, including 10,745 elderly individuals, were included. When pooled across all age definitions, rates of overall complications (OR 1.20, 95%CI 0.95-1.53) and major complications (OR 1.39, 95%CI 0.92-2.

【結論】PCNL can be performed safely in elderly patients, with SFR and complication profiles comparable to those observed in younger individuals when data across different elderly definitions are pooled.

結構化摘要.方法: A systematic review and meta-analysis were conducted in accordance with PRISMA guidelines. Comparative studies evaluating outcomes of PCNL in elderly versus non-elderly patients were identified through comprehensive searches of PubMed/MEDLINE, Embase, Web of Science, and the Cochrane Library up to February 2026. Primary outcomes included overall, minor, and major complications, as well as stone-free rate (SFR). Subgroup analyses were performed according to different age thresholds used to define
結構化摘要.結果: Seventeen studies encompassing 45,603 patients, including 10,745 elderly individuals, were included. When pooled across all age definitions, rates of overall complications (OR 1.20, 95%CI 0.95-1.53) and major complications (OR 1.39, 95%CI 0.92-2.10) did not differ significantly between elderly and younger patients. Elderly patients demonstrated a significantly higher risk of postoperative sepsis (OR 3.94, 95%CI 1.83-8.47). SFR were comparable between groups. In subgroup analyses, studies applyin
結構化摘要.結論: PCNL can be performed safely in elderly patients, with SFR and complication profiles comparable to those observed in younger individuals when data across different elderly definitions are pooled. However, overall and major complications increases progressively with advancing age within the elderly population, especially among patients aged ≥ 70 years.

重點文章.標題: Examining the risk of neurotoxicity in patients who receive unadjusted doses of oral beta-lactams in renal insufficiency: a retrospective cohort study.

PICO.P_族群: receive unadjusted doses of oral beta-lactams in renal insufficiency: a retrospective cohort study
PICO.C_對照: renally adjusted doses of oral beta-lactams
PICO.O_結果: incidence of 'probable' or 'definite' beta-lactam related neurotoxicity

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究背景】In patients with reduced renal function, drug monographs recommend reduced doses of oral beta-lactams. However, dose reductions could result in suboptimal pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic target attainment, compromising efficacy.

【研究方法】This single-site, retrospective cohort study included patients with renal insufficiency prescribed full dose or renally adjusted doses of oral beta-lactams. Neurotoxicity symptoms were graded via chart review using the Naranjo Adverse Drug Reaction Probability Scale.

【主要結果】The cohort included 987 patients with renal insufficiency receiving 1001 full-dose courses and 122 renally adjusted dose courses. The rate of 'probable' or 'definite' neurotoxicity was 0.1% (1/1001) in the full dose group and 0.8% (1/122) in the renally adjusted group (p = 0.08).

【結論】There was no increase in 'probable' or 'definite' neurotoxicities detected among patients with renal insufficiency receiving full dose as compared to renally adjusted doses of oral beta-lactams, suggesting that using full doses are a safe way to optimize the pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic parameter...

結構化摘要.背景: In patients with reduced renal function, drug monographs recommend reduced doses of oral beta-lactams. However, dose reductions could result in suboptimal pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic target attainment, compromising efficacy. This study evaluated the safety of full doses of oral beta-lactams in patients with reduced renal function by assessing the incidence of neurotoxic symptoms.
結構化摘要.方法: This single-site, retrospective cohort study included patients with renal insufficiency prescribed full dose or renally adjusted doses of oral beta-lactams. Neurotoxicity symptoms were graded via chart review using the Naranjo Adverse Drug Reaction Probability Scale. The primary outcome was incidence of 'probable' or 'definite' beta-lactam related neurotoxicity. Multivariate logistic regression was used to adjust for differences in baseline characteristics.
結構化摘要.結果: The cohort included 987 patients with renal insufficiency receiving 1001 full-dose courses and 122 renally adjusted dose courses. The rate of 'probable' or 'definite' neurotoxicity was 0.1% (1/1001) in the full dose group and 0.8% (1/122) in the renally adjusted group (p = 0.08). There was no difference between groups when stratified by early or late stage renal insufficiency. After adjustment for differences in baseline characteristics, receiving full dose oral beta-lactams was not associated w
結構化摘要.結論: There was no increase in 'probable' or 'definite' neurotoxicities detected among patients with renal insufficiency receiving full dose as compared to renally adjusted doses of oral beta-lactams, suggesting that using full doses are a safe way to optimize the pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic parameters of these drugs.

重點文章.標題: [Lifestyle pattern and therapeutic adherence in patients on hemodialysis].
重點文章.期刊: Revista medica del Instituto Mexicano del Seguro Social

PICO.P_族群: CKD undergoing HD following educational interventions (EIs)
PICO.I_介入: 7 individualized educational sessions showed significant improvements in self-care practices as measured by LP

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本研究旨在探討To determine changes in LP and TA in patients with CKD undergoing HD following educational interventions (EIs). MATERIAL AND

【研究方法】Quasi-experimental, longitudinal, non-randomized study. Sociodemographic and clinical-therapeutic variables were analyzed. Evaluation tools were applied to identify changes in LP and TA before and after a 6-month period of EIs. The EIs consisted of 7 individualized sessions provided in the HD unit.

【主要結果】The sample included 39 patients, with a mean age of 52.87 years; 53% were male. Initially, 100% of participants were classified as "at risk" in LP, and 0% had "full adherence" in TA. After the EIs, 43.6% of patients achieved a "protective" LP, and 38.5% reached "full adherence" in TA (p = 0.00).

【結論】Patients who received 7 individualized educational sessions showed significant improvements in self-care practices as measured by LP, as well as notable improvement in TA.

結構化摘要.背景: Chronic kidney disease (CKD) is a common complication of hypertension and diabetes mellitus. Hemodialysis (HD) is a renal replacement therapy that requires self-care and therapeutic adherence (TA), which if not performed increase the risk of associated complications. Therefore, it is essential to adopt self-care practices and implement modifications in lifestyle patterns (LP).
結構化摘要.目的: To determine changes in LP and TA in patients with CKD undergoing HD following educational interventions (EIs). MATERIAL AND
結構化摘要.方法: Quasi-experimental, longitudinal, non-randomized study. Sociodemographic and clinical-therapeutic variables were analyzed. Evaluation tools were applied to identify changes in LP and TA before and after a 6-month period of EIs. The EIs consisted of 7 individualized sessions provided in the HD unit. Measures of central tendency, chi-square test, and Student's t test were used for data analysis.
結構化摘要.結果: The sample included 39 patients, with a mean age of 52.87 years; 53% were male. Initially, 100% of participants were classified as "at risk" in LP, and 0% had "full adherence" in TA. After the EIs, 43.6% of patients achieved a "protective" LP, and 38.5% reached "full adherence" in TA (p = 0.00).
結構化摘要.結論: Patients who received 7 individualized educational sessions showed significant improvements in self-care practices as measured by LP, as well as notable improvement in TA.

關鍵詞: Ensayos Clínicos Controlados no Aleatorios como Asunto

重點文章.標題: Risk factors for post-renal transplant ureteral stenosis: a survival analysis in a contemporary cohort.

PICO.P_族群: 患有 Kidney Transplantation 的病人
PICO.O_結果: the time to radiologically confirmed ureteral stenosis within the first post-transplant year

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本世代研究旨在探討Ureteral stenosis remains a significant urological complication after kidney transplantation. This study aimed to identify independent risk factors for the development of post-transplant ureteral stenosis and to evaluate their temporal impact using survival analysis in a contemporary cohort.

【研究方法】A retrospective single-center cohort study was conducted, including 342 deceased donor kidney transplant recipients between 2014 and 2024. The primary endpoint was the time to radiologically confirmed ureteral stenosis within the first post-transplant year.

【主要結果】The incidence of ureteral stenosis was 11.1% (n = 38). Multivariable Cox regression identified urinary fistula as the strongest associated factor (Hazard Ratio [HR]: 8.28; 95% CI: 3.87-17.72; p < 0.001), drastically reducing median stenosis-free survival to 188.9 days.

【結論】Urinary fistula was the strongest predictor of ureteral stenosis, underscoring the importance of its prevention. Routine prophylactic double-J stenting appeared to be an effective protective strategy.

結構化摘要.方法: A retrospective single-center cohort study was conducted, including 342 deceased donor kidney transplant recipients between 2014 and 2024. The primary endpoint was the time to radiologically confirmed ureteral stenosis within the first post-transplant year. Univariate analysis and Kaplan-Meier survival curves were used to identify associated factors. A multivariable Cox proportional hazards model was constructed to determine independent predictors, adjusting for clinically relevant variables.
結構化摘要.結果: The incidence of ureteral stenosis was 11.1% (n = 38). Multivariable Cox regression identified urinary fistula as the strongest associated factor (Hazard Ratio [HR]: 8.28; 95% CI: 3.87-17.72; p < 0.001), drastically reducing median stenosis-free survival to 188.9 days. Diabetes mellitus showed a borderline association with stenosis (HR: 2.41; 95% CI: 1.02-5.72; p = 0.046). Conversely, the prophylactic use of a double-J stent was an independent protective factor, reducing the risk of stenosis by
結構化摘要.結論: Urinary fistula was the strongest predictor of ureteral stenosis, underscoring the importance of its prevention. Routine prophylactic double-J stenting appeared to be an effective protective strategy. Diabetes mellitus showed a borderline association with stenosis and may identify a subgroup requiring closer postoperative urological surveillance; this finding should be interpreted cautiously and confirmed in larger studies.

重點文章.標題: The pedfix technique: a new minimally invasive method of peritoneal dialysis catheter insertion with secure fixation to the abdominal wall-a preliminary experience.
重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本研究旨在探討Peritoneal Dialysis (PD) is the most common modality of renal replacement therapy in children with acute kidney injury (AKI). Various open and laparoscopic techniques for the placement of peritoneal dialysis (PD) catheter, with or without intra-abdominal fixation, have been described.

【研究方法】For 18 years a laparoscopic assisted PD catheter insertion has been used by the first author with a single 5 mm Port at the umbilicus using an inverted J incision and a Seldinger technique, with either a 14 or 16 Fr introducer kit.

【主要結果】Six patients- 4 boys, mean age at surgery 7.8 years- underwent PD catheter insertion using the modified technique. All patients were in End Stage Kidney Disease due to posterior urethral valves and renal dysplasia (2), nephronophthisis (1) renal dysplasia (1), focal segmental glomerulosclerosis (1) ...

【結論】The Pedfix technique provides excellent cosmetic results, optimal pelvic visualization and fixation of the PD catheter to the lower anterior abdominal wall which minimizes the risk of catheter migration and blockage.

結構化摘要.方法: For 18 years a laparoscopic assisted PD catheter insertion has been used by the first author with a single 5 mm Port at the umbilicus using an inverted J incision and a Seldinger technique, with either a 14 or 16 Fr introducer kit. In October 2024, the technique was modified to include fixation of the catheter to the lower anterior abdominal wall using an Endoclose device (Autosuture, Covidien).
結構化摘要.結果: Six patients- 4 boys, mean age at surgery 7.8 years- underwent PD catheter insertion using the modified technique. All patients were in End Stage Kidney Disease due to posterior urethral valves and renal dysplasia (2), nephronophthisis (1) renal dysplasia (1), focal segmental glomerulosclerosis (1) multi-cystic dysplastic kidney on one side and dysplasia on the contralateral side (1). All six cases underwent successful placement of a PD catheter. Four patients had no post-operative complications
結構化摘要.結論: The Pedfix technique provides excellent cosmetic results, optimal pelvic visualization and fixation of the PD catheter to the lower anterior abdominal wall which minimizes the risk of catheter migration and blockage. These encouraging results need to be confirmed by a prospective study with longer follow up.

重點文章.標題: Diabetic ketoacidosis in end-stage renal disease: propensity score-matched national inpatient outcomes.
重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本世代研究旨在探討ed at reducing complications rather than mortality alone.

【研究方法】We performed a retrospective cohort study using the National Inpatient Sample (2016-2022) of adult hospitalizations with a primary diagnosis of DKA, comparing patients with and without ESRD.

【主要結果】. We compared in-hospital outcomes and healthcare utilization among patients hospitalized with DKA with and without ESRD using a national database. METHODS: We performed a retrospective cohort study using the National Inpatient Sample (2016-2022) of adult hospitalizations with a primary diagnosis of...

【結論】Among patients hospitalized with DKA, ESRD was not associated with increased in-hospital mortality after adjustment but was linked to substantially greater morbidity and healthcare resource utilization.

結構化摘要.背景: Diabetic ketoacidosis (DKA) increasingly occurs in patients with end-stage renal disease (ESRD), in whom standard management strategies may not be appropriate. Prior studies evaluating outcomes of DKA in ESRD are limited and yield inconsistent results. We compared in-hospital outcomes and healthcare utilization among patients hospitalized with DKA with and without ESRD using a national database.
結構化摘要.方法: We performed a retrospective cohort study using the National Inpatient Sample (2016-2022) of adult hospitalizations with a primary diagnosis of DKA, comparing patients with and without ESRD. Propensity score matching was used to balance demographics and comorbidities; multivariable regression was used to estimate adjusted odds ratios (aORs) for in-hospital mortality, major in-hospital complications, length of stay, and inflation-adjusted hospitalization costs.
結構化摘要.結果: . We compared in-hospital outcomes and healthcare utilization among patients hospitalized with DKA with and without ESRD using a national database. METHODS: We performed a retrospective cohort study using the National Inpatient Sample (2016-2022) of adult hospitalizations with a primary diagnosis of DKA, comparing patients with and without ESRD. Propensity score matching was used to balance demographics and comorbidities; multivariable regression was used to estimate adjusted odds ratios (aORs)
結構化摘要.結論: Among patients hospitalized with DKA, ESRD was not associated with increased in-hospital mortality after adjustment but was linked to substantially greater morbidity and healthcare resource utilization. These findings highlight the need for ESRD-adapted DKA management strategies aimed at reducing complications rather than mortality alone.

考慮進行兒童至成人的長期追蹤研究：

應用人工智慧於腎臟病研究：

2. 影像自動判讀系統
3. 治療反應預測
